name: 2022-12-tigris
note: Findings verified against the official C4 report (11 High / 24 Medium) and grounded to the clone's source lines. IDs carry the report's H-/M- number. The matcher keys primarily on (contract, function); line is documented to the actual bug site.

known_findings.summary: pnl() runs entirely inside an unchecked block; with a user-controlled take-profit/current price the expression (1e18 * _currentPrice / _price - 1e18) and _initPositionSize multiplication can overflow, producing an astronomically large _positionSize and letting a trader mint enough tigAsset to drain vaults (H-03).

addToPosition computes the blended entry price as _trade.price*_trade.margin/_newMargin + _price*_addMargin/_newMargin (a margin-weighted arithmetic average) instead of the correct harmonic combination, mispricing the merged position and miscalculating payout (H-06). Protocol-specific price-averaging invariant, not a modeled sink.

_handleOpenFees returns an incorrect _feePaid when a referral is set (the referral discount/credit is mis-accounted), so the margin actually deposited diverges from intent and a user can open with more effective margin than paid for (M-11/M-20). Protocol-specific fee accounting, not a modeled sink.

deposit/withdraw scale the amount by 10**(18 - token.decimals()); a margin token with more than 18 decimals underflows the exponent (and the 18-decimal assumption breaks for other non-18 tokens), corrupting the tigAsset mint/redeem amount (M-19).

_checkDelay enforces the anti-front-run open/close delay using block.number + blockDelay; on Arbitrum/Optimism block.number reflects the L1 block, not the L2 block, so the intended per-second delay is not enforced as designed (M-15).

verifyPrice reads the Chainlink feed via latestAnswer() and uses it only as a +/-2% sanity band, never checking updatedAt/answeredInRound freshness, so a stale Chainlink price (or a node price within 2% of a stale value) is accepted as a valid mark price (M-24).
